headline: Regeneron's Applications for gMG Drug Accepted by FDA and EMA
summary: Regeneron's cemdisiran won FDA Priority Review and EMA filing acceptance for gMG, backed by phase III data and a potentially unique dosing schedule.

headline: Are Biosimilars Becoming a Key Pillar of Amgen's Growth Story?

headline: Viatris Soared 54%: Time To Be More Careful (Rating Downgrade)

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on AbbVie (ABBV), Sees Value in Apogee Acquisition
summary: With a 5-Year Average Dividend Growth Rate of 6.33%, AbbVie Inc. (NYSE:ABBV) is included among the Top 11 Dividend Kings to Buy for Safe Dividend Growth. On June 22, Wells Fargo maintained an Overweight rating on AbbVie Inc. (NYSE:ABBV). It also set a $260 price target on the shares. The firm said AbbVie’s reported bid […]
